---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle or Author Name"
date: "March 14, 2023"
Date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  atlanta-fed-revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: title_background.jpg
      data-background-size: cover
      data-background-position: center
---

## Slide Title

Body text in IBM Plex Sans 28pt. Replace this with your content.

- Bullet point one
- Bullet point two
- Bullet point three

## Another Slide

Use `##` to create each new content slide.

| Column A | Column B | Column C |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Value 1  | Value 2  | Value 3  |
| Value 4  | Value 5  | Value 6  |

## Two-Column Layout

:::  {.columns}
::: {.column}
**Left column**

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three
:::
::: {.column}
**Right column**

- Item A
- Item B
- Item C
:::
:::
